Title: Non-binary Entanglement-assisted Stabilizer Quantum Codes
Reason: 비이진 양자 stabilizer 코드 구성, non-binary LDPC 사용 — 비이진+양자 전용으로 이중 제외
Abstract: In this paper, we show how to construct non-binary entanglement-assisted stabilizer quantum codes by using pre-shared entanglement between the sender and receiver. We also give an algorithm to determine the circuit for non-binary entanglement-assisted stabilizer quantum codes and some illustrated examples. The codes we constructed do not require the dual-containing constraint, and many non-binary classical codes, like non-binary LDPC codes, which do not satisfy the condition, can be used to construct non-binary entanglement-assisted stabilizer quantum codes.

Title: Joint Network and LDPC Coding for Bi-directional Relaying
Reason: 양방향 릴레이 네트워크-LDPC 결합, LLR 유도가 네트워크코딩 응용 특이적 — 떼어낼 ECC 기법 없음
Authors: Xiaofu Wu, Weijun Zeng, Chunming Zhao, Xiaohu You
Abstract: In this paper, we consider joint network and LDPC coding for practically implementing the denosie-and-forward protocol over bi-directional relaying. the closed-form expressions for computing the log-likelihood ratios of the network-coded codewords have been derived for both real and complex multiple-access channels. It is revealed that the equivalent channel observed at the relay is an asymmetrical channel, where the channel input is the XOR form of the two source nodes.
